summary: Comprehensive stability testing completed for AlphaAI Fund Platform. Tested all modules including Simulation Engine, Strategy Lab, Risk Management, Capital Allocation, Trading, AI Agents, Reports, Investor Management, Fund Management, AI Analysis, and Marketplace. Conducted stress testing with 20+ simulation cycles and 10 strategy generations. Edge cases and data integrity verified. Frontend UI testing completed across all pages with responsive design validation.

minor_bugs.impact: Paper trading toggle endpoint method issue

ui_bugs.issue: Dialog overlay intercepts pointer events preventing mobile menu click

integration_issues.issue: Simulation Engine text selector timeout on some page loads

passed_tests: Fund Stats retrieval with NAV $500K, AUM $750K, Sharpe 1.62
AI Market Analysis with GPT integration
Daily report generation (91 trades, 36.3% win rate)
Strategy generation, backtesting, sandbox, deployment pipeline
Risk management config (5% max drawdown, auto-shutdown enabled)
Edge case handling (excessive withdrawal, below-minimum deposit)
Frontend landing page with hero section and stats
Dashboard wallet connection and investor data
Strategy Lab with 40 strategy cards and backtesting
AI Agents page with analysis functionality
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor API endpoints (market data, execution simulation) and mobile menu overlay issue. All critical functionality working correctly.

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (most UI components working, minor mobile menu issue)
